lines: Can you balance on one foot like a mountain, {player}?
The ground is steady when we find our center.
Stand tall and strong, just like me, {player}!
no_quest_line: Your balance is as solid as stone, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm testing how steady these logs are. Will you help me check them, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Slow and steady wins the race! You're doing it, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Outstanding balance, {player}! You're as steady as a mountain peak.
